prompt: a vagetable and a basket on the table

checks.name: object_presence
checks.evidence: The rendered observer view shows one basket and one green vegetable-like object on the tabletop.

checks.name: basket_orientation
checks.evidence: The basket is rendered open-side upward after changing 110_basket to qpos [0.70710678, 0.70710678, 0, 0].

checks.name: table_contact_and_penetration
checks.evidence: No obvious basket/table penetration, severe floating, or sideways basket pose is visible in the observer camera.

checks.name: prompt_match
checks.evidence: The scene satisfies the prompt at the visual level: a vagetable and a basket on the table.

limitations: This is a Codex visual reference review from the current development session, not a reproducible external VLM API call.
Future automated runs should use an external VLM backend or a required human review report before marking pipeline_summary.status as pass.
